<!-- Generated from clap definitions by mistralrs-cli docgen. Do not edit. -->

Authenticate with HuggingFace Hub

```
mistralrs login [OPTIONS]
```

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--token <TOKEN>` |  | Provide token directly (non-interactive) |
